body:
Several highly-rated companies in the Livermore area specialize in garage door spring replacement, with _Good Golly Garage Doors_ and _Boulevard Garage Doors_ often recommended for their local expertise and prompt service. [TOP 10 BEST Garage Door Spring Repair in Livermore, CA](https://m.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Garage+Door+Spring+Repair&find_loc=Livermore%2C+CA)[Garage Door Spring Repair in Livermore, CA](https://goodgollygarage.com/garage-door-repair/garage-door-spring-repair-livermore-ca)

Here are top options for spring repair based on local service availability in 2026:

  * ** _Good Golly Garage Doors_ :** Known for timely, efficient service, they specialize in replacing broken springs and offer clear, upfront pricing without hidden fees.
  * ** _Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC_ :** A locally owned and operated East Bay company that emphasizes high-quality parts, industry-leading warranties, and guaranteed same-day repair service. [TOP 10 BEST Garage Door Spring Repair in Livermore, CA](https://m.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Garage+Door+Spring+Repair&find_loc=Livermore%2C+CA)
  * **[Precision Garage Door of East Bay](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/livermore) :** Highly rated for experienced technicians, with reviews highlighting quick service and thorough, knowledgeable staff. [Garage Door Repair Reviews in Livermore, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/livermore)
  * **[Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/livermore/garage-door-repair/) :** Provides comprehensive repair services for all garage door models, with vans stocked to perform same-day repairs. [Garage Door Repair in Livermore, CA | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/livermore/garage-door-repair/)
  * **[Garage Door Repair Livermore (Pro)](https://www.gaterepairpro.com/livermore/garage-door-spring-repair-livermore-ca/) :** Offers 24-hour emergency service, free estimates, and same-day appointments for spring replacements.

**Key Considerations for Choosing a Company:**

  * **Warranty:** Look for companies offering at least a one-year warranty on parts and labor.
  * **Same-Day Service:** Because broken springs render the door unusable, prioritize companies that offer prompt, same-day repairs.
  * **Safety:** Ensure the company is fully licensed and insured, as spring replacement is dangerous. [TOP 10 BEST Garage Door Spring Repair in Livermore, CA](https://m.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Garage+Door+Spring+Repair&find_loc=Livermore%2C+CA)[Garage Door Spring Repair in Livermore, CA](https://goodgollygarage.com/garage-door-repair/garage-door-spring-repair-livermore-ca)[Garage Door Replacement Parts | Service | Oregon Garage Door](https://www.oregoncitygaragedoor.com/service-and-repair/garage-door-parts/)[F&L Doors: Residential & Commercial Garage Door Company](https://fldoors.com/)[FAQ – OVERHEAD DOOR COMPANY OF BALTIMORE, INC](https://ohdbalt.com/faq/)

If you can tell me **if your door is currently stuck open or closed** , or **what brand of opener you have** , I can help you find a company that specializes in that exact issue.
